pr.title: Non-record: 1.8184 BPB Single-step Recurrent Transformer with Q-LoRA (Windows 3090)

output.summary: Single-pass wide transformer with near-full-rank dual-Q attention replaces depth recurrence for 10-minute RTX 3090 tuning.
techniques: Replace depth recurrence with steps=1 wide block to fit more steps in 10-minute runs
Dual-Q LoRA adapter functions as a near-full-rank second Q projection
Custom gradient scaler, loss filter, and EMA tracking stabilize tight-budget training
